title: AFK Message
description: Sends a message in chat when a player goes AFK
body:
# AFK Message

**An add-on for [Detect AFK Players](https://modrinth.com/datapack/detect-afk)**.

When a player's AFK status changes, this datapack announces it to the server to let everyone know.

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mJLTsjvZ/images/06ab87456e5869c7ba39c774f3e846d64157b4df.jpeg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mJLTsjvZ/images/06ab87456e5869c7ba39c774f3e846d64157b4df.jpeg)
